title: RMLNLU student committees warn of mass resignation over restructuring, seek resolution by June 12
description: Members of various student committees at Dr Ram Manohar Lohiya National Law University (RMLNLU), Lucknow have warned of mass resignations by June 12 unless the administration addresses concerns over the restructuring of the committees for the 2026-27 academic session. 3 committees submitted a joint representation to the Vice-Chancellor (VC) stating that the restructuring had rendered them effectively powerless in the discharge of their responsibilities.The joint representation states that indivi
